🔍 The Problem

🔧 How to Fix RCA PF - Step by Step

1

Step 1: Restart

Restart. For RCA Dryer, this is a common troubleshooting step. Follow manufacturer guidelines and ensure proper safety precautions.

!

Safety First

Always disconnect power before working on any appliance. If you're unsure, consult a professional technician.
